error.internal: An internal error occurred. Please try again later.
error.not_found: The requested resource was not found.
error.unauthorized: Authentication is required to access this resource.
error.forbidden: You do not have permission to access this resource.
error.rate_limited: Too many requests. Please try again later.

auth.quota_exceeded: You have reached today's query limit ({limit} queries). Please upgrade your plan or try again tomorrow.
auth.token_invalid: Authentication token is invalid or expired.

health.degraded: Service is running with limited functionality.

chat.no_context: No relevant content found in the knowledge base for your query.
chat.disclaimer_legal: The above information is for general reference only and does not constitute legal advice. Please consult a licensed solicitor for specific cases.
chat.pii_detected: Personal data was detected and has been automatically redacted.
chat.stream_error: An error occurred while generating the response. Please try again later.
chat.conversation_not_found: The specified conversation was not found.
